item.title: Hardcoded safe fields in protect_items_from_groom() should be a declared constant
item.intent: Extract the hardcoded safe fields list in protect_items_from_groom() into a named constant array so the merge logic is transparent and maintainable
steps: Find the hardcoded safe fields comparison in protect_items_from_groom()
Extract to a GROOM_SAFE_FIELDS constant array declared with other constants
Update the jq filter to reference the constant
acceptanceCriteria: Safe fields are declared as a named constant, not inline in the jq filter
